If y’all are in evacuation zone please leave. Don’t let ego or anything stop you from being safe. As paramedic I can tell you, that if it hits your area there is a huge chance that no one is coming to help you for a while. Anything over 55 MPH sustained winds we stop responding in Pinellas county. If the water is too high our ambulance and fire trucks won’t reach you. Last hurricane there were people waiting 6+ hours after calling 911. I’m not trying to scare anyone I just want everyone to make an informed decision. This isn’t like TV shows, we are not super heroes and there is a chance that for some who choose to stay no one will make it in time.
Please just visit us in Minnesota. We are nice. Its a little chilly but you can wait it out here. Please dont risk staying in Florida. You can go back home once things calm.
